description: Style NoteMixing classic natural prints with a hint of the exotic (nailing the latest summer trend) colour block this top from Tonga with for an effortlessly breezy vibe. For winter, you can smarten this up by layering it with a pastel toned cardi or a colour pop blazer. Product DetailsOff-white round neck top with orange print on the chest which has short puff sleeves with a bow detail made of sheer fabric Material and Care95% rayon, 5% spandexHandwashDo not bleachHang to drySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
